recommendations.title: Pretty Village, Pretty Flame
recommendations.overview: In the opening stages of the Bosnian War, a small group of Serbian soldiers are trapped in a tunnel by a Muslim force.

recommendations.title: Counterattack
recommendations.overview: When a hostage rescue mission creates a new enemy, Capt. Guerrero and his elite soldiers must face an ambush by a criminal group.

recommendations.title: Sand Castle
recommendations.overview: Set during the occupation of Iraq, a squad of U.S. soldiers try to protect a small village.

recommendations.title: Age of Heroes
recommendations.overview: The true story of the formation of Ian Fleming's 30 Commando unit, a precursor for the elite forces in the U.K.

recommendations.title: Amaran
recommendations.overview: A heroic true story of Major Mukund Varadarajan, an Indian Army officer who displayed extraordinary bravery during a counterterrorism mission in Kashmir’s Shopian district. The film captures his courage in protecting his nation and the devotion of hi

recommendations.title: Hamburger Hill
recommendations.overview: The men of Bravo Company are facing a battle that's all uphill… up Hamburger Hill. Fourteen war-weary soldiers are battling for a mud-covered mound of earth so named because it chews up soldiers like chopped meat. They are fighting for their country,

recommendations.title: Kajaki
recommendations.overview: British soldiers guarding the Kajaki Dam set out to rescue a three-man team after one of them loses a leg to a landmine.

recommendations.title: Devotion
recommendations.overview: The harrowing true story of two elite US Navy fighter pilots during the Korean War. Their heroic sacrifices would ultimately make them the Navy's most celebrated wingmen.

recommendations.title: Ghosts of War
recommendations.overview: A group of World War II American soldiers encounter a supernatural enemy as they occupy a French castle previously under Nazi control.

recommendations.title: Saints and Soldiers
recommendations.overview: Five American soldiers fighting in Europe during World War II struggle to return to Allied territory after being separated from U.S. forces during the historic Malmedy Massacre.
